FlavourText.original: They wrap around you until your blood turns as cold as theirs.
FlavourText.zh_cn: 用鲜血灌溉它，让它的残暴更加的嗜血。
FlavourText.zh_tw: 牠們環繞、緊箍，直到你的熱血不再。

translation.zh_cn: 左戒指栏位：[Spells|法术]的[Projectiles|投射物]无法[Chain|连锁]
translation.zh_tw: 左手戒指欄位：[Spells|法術]的[Projectiles|投射物]無法[Chain|連鎖]

translation.zh_cn: 左戒指栏位：[Spells|法术]的[Projectiles|投射物][Fork|分叉]
translation.zh_tw: 左手戒指欄位：[Spells|法術]的[Projectiles|投射物]會[Fork|分岔]

translation.zh_cn: 右戒指栏位：[Spells|法术]的[Projectiles|投射物]会额外[Chain|连锁] {0} 次
translation.zh_tw: 右手戒指欄位：[Spells|法術]的[Projectiles|投射物] {0} 次[Chain|連鎖]

translation.zh_cn: 右戒指栏位：[Spells|法术]的[Projectiles|投射物]无法[Fork|分叉]
translation.zh_tw: 右手戒指欄位：[Spells|法術]的[Projectiles|投射物]無法[Fork|分岔]

translation.zh_cn: [Spells|法术]技能的[Projectiles|投射物]速度降低 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 減少 {0}% [Spells|法術]技能的[Projectiles|投射物]速度

group.original: Skills have {0}% chance to not remove [Elemental Infusions|Elemental Infusions] but still count as consuming them

translation.zh_cn: 技能有 {0}% 的几率不移除[Elemental Infusions|元素灌注]，但仍视作消耗了它们
translation.zh_tw: 技能有 {0}% 機率不會移除[Elemental Infusions|元素灌注]，但仍視為將其消耗
